abilities.name: Caustic Aura
abilities.description: Living characters that begin their turn within 🂎2 of one or more characters with this ability suffer 1 damage and may not declare (0) Actions until the start of their next turn.

abilities.name: Controlled Deformation
abilities.description: If this character is within 2 yards of at least three other characters with this ability at the start of its turn, it absorbs every such character and becomes a Desolation Engine. The new Desolation Engine may not act this round.

abilities.name: Desolate Warping
abilities.description: After killing a Living, Construct, or Undead character, this character may discard a card to transform it into an Abomination that may not act this round. If this happens, this character heals to full Wounds.

abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer 🂠.

abilities.name: (1) Claws of Metal and Bone (Pugilism)
abilities.description: AV: 4 — Rg: ★ 1 — Resist: Df. Target suffers 2/3/3 damage. ⬜ Consuming Touch: After damaging, this character heals an amount of damage equal to the amount the target suffered from this attack.
